title: quercus senescens
intro: Quercus senescens, also known as the Chinese corkbark oak, is a species of deciduous tree native to China and Southeast Asia. The bark of this tree contains a high concentration of tannins, which provide its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Quercus senescens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatism and arthritis symptoms, and promote digestive health. Herbal preparations of Quercus senescens typically involve the bark, which can be dried and made into tea, capsules, or extracts for use in traditional medicine.
